name: MilkyWan
notes:
MilkyWan has migrated from `AS57199` to `AS2027` 

We are a FTTH, xDSL and IP Transit provider in France. We have an open peering policy, we are also looking for sponsors for PoP, IX and Transit in France, contact us if you are interested ! 

Prefixes from `bgpq4` on AS-MILKYWAN (2025-03-01) : 
* IPv4 `69` -> recommended max-prefix `200` 
* IPv6 `94` -> recommended max-prefix `200`

Please contact NOC if you want to enable `BFD` on peering sessions.
